recommendations.title: The Private Lives of Pippa Lee
recommendations.overview: After her much older husband forces a move to a suburban retirement community, Pippa Lee engages in a period of reflection and finds herself heading toward a quiet nervous breakdown.

recommendations.title: The Ballad of Jack and Rose
recommendations.overview: Jack Slavin is an environmentalist with a heart condition who lives with his daughter, Rose, on an isolated island. While Jack fights against developers who wish to build in the area, he also craves more contact with other people. When he invites his

recommendations.title: She Came to Me
recommendations.overview: Composer Steven Lauddem is plagued by a creative block which leaves him unable to finish the score for his big comeback opera. When his former therapist-turned-wife Patricia suggests he rekindle his creativity by getting lost in the city, Steven sets

recommendations.title: Lucas
recommendations.overview: A brilliant but socially inept 14-year-old experiences heartbreak for the first time when his two best friends – Cappie, an older-brother figure, and Maggie, the new girl with whom he is in love – fall for each other.

recommendations.title: Million Dollar Baby
recommendations.overview: Despondent over a painful estrangement from his daughter, trainer Frankie Dunn isn't prepared for boxer Maggie Fitzgerald to enter his life. But Maggie's determined to go pro and to convince Dunn and his cohort to help her.

recommendations.title: Vicky Donor
recommendations.overview: A man is brought in by an infertility doctor to supply him with his sperm, where he becomes the biggest sperm donor for his clinic.

recommendations.title: Joy of Fatherhood
recommendations.overview: A sperm donor becomes impotent - and so he searches for the woman, who got his sperm, to become a father after all...

recommendations.title: We Are Pregnant
recommendations.overview: It seems simple: an egg + sperm = one embryo. But if your sperm is "few, vague and abnormal" and your woman is premenopausal at age 37, things start to get complicated.

recommendations.title: I Could Never Be Your Woman
recommendations.overview: A mother falls for a younger man while her daughter falls in love for the first time.

recommendations.title: Better Than Chocolate
